summary: Review #4 after external reviewer feedback: RenderPastePipeline and RenderPastePipelineINI now return (result, error) with duplicate middleware Name detection, consistent with RenderPluginConfig's existing duplicate ConfigSection guard. Tests updated to handle the new error return and a dedicated duplicate-name error test added. All 16 tests pass, 97.6% coverage, go vet clean, golangci-lint 0 issues, no regressions across internal/common/... packages.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases covered (nil, empty, unknown position, zero-value position, empty config, empty AppName, duplicate names)
Error paths tested (duplicate middleware Name returns error with contextual message)

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (gomega dot-import, NewGomegaWithT, table-driven)
License headers and Feature: CC-0004 present
Functions are pure (no K8s API calls)
Consistent error return convention between RenderPastePipeline and RenderPluginConfig
Godoc comments updated to document new error return

security_checklist.item: No user input accepted (pure functions with typed Go structs)
No path traversal or injection risk

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is minimal — duplicate guard mirrors existing RenderPluginConfig pattern
Error return is idiomatic Go (result, error) tuple
No scope creep — changes limited to plugins.go and plugins_test.go

fail_fast_checklist.item: Duplicate middleware Names detected before generating filter sections
Error message includes both the duplicate Name and pipeline name for debugging

defensive_checklist.item: Unknown/zero-value Position silently skipped (no filter section generated)
Duplicate names return error rather than silently overwriting

metadata.title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages
